_note: Editorial — hand-curated from https://northwoodsleague.com/wausau-ignite/2026-promotional-schedule-2/. Each event: {date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', month: 'Jun', day: '11', title: '...', desc: '...', tags: ['promo'|'theme'|'community'|'fireworks'|...]}.

events.title: Opening Day 2026 vs La Crosse Steam
events.desc: First pitch at 6:35 PM. Drawstring Backpack giveaway (first 250 fans, presented by Wipfli). Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts throughout the park.

events.title: Rally Towel Giveaway vs Grand Forks Spitfires
events.desc: First 250 fans through the gate receive an Ignite Rally Towel. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Hilarious Heeler Meet & Greet
events.desc: $15 ticket includes Meet & Greet with Heeler characters pregame in the Pepsi Tailgate Pavilion. Colby/Abby Softball Fundraiser Night. Festival Foods Family Tickets: $12 with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM vs Grand Forks Spitfires.

events.title: White Claw Wednesday vs Minot Honeybees
events.desc: White Claw specials throughout the ballpark, presented by White Claw Hard Seltzer. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Ignite Softball Giveaway vs Minot Honeybees
events.desc: First 250 fans receive a softball, presented by Medical College of Wisconsin – Central Wisconsin. Merrill Fastpitch Fundraiser Night. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Tote Bag Giveaway vs Madison Night Mares
events.desc: First 250 fans through the gate receive an Ignite mesh tote bag. White Claw Wednesday specials throughout the ballpark. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Seat Cushion Giveaway vs La Crosse Steam
events.desc: First 250 fans receive an Ignite seat cushion. Festival Foods Family Tickets: $12 with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Kids Run the Bases — Doubleheader vs Madison Night Mares
events.desc: Doubleheader. After the game all kids 12 and under are invited onto the field to run the bases and meet their favorite players. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Bang for Your Buck Night — Doubleheader vs Madison Night Mares
events.desc: Doubleheader. $2 hot dogs and tap sodas, $4 domestic drafts throughout the park. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Everest Fastpitch Fundraiser — Doubleheader vs Mankato Habaneros
events.desc: Doubleheader. Everest Fastpitch Fundraiser Night. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Replica Jersey Giveaway vs Mankato Habaneros
events.desc: First 250 fans through the gate receive an Ignite Replica Jersey, presented by Wisconsin Chevy Dealers. Tomahawk Youth Softball Fundraiser Night. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Pennant Giveaway — Doubleheader vs Grand Forks Spitfires
events.desc: Doubleheader. First 250 fans receive an Ignite Pennant, presented by Aspirus. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Beach Towel Giveaway vs Minot Honeybees
events.desc: First 250 fans receive an Ignite Beach Towel, presented by Festival Foods. Festival Foods Family Tickets: $12 with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Faith and Family Night vs Minot Honeybees
events.desc: Family-friendly fun: $8 Bleacher Seats or $25 Leinie's Party Area Tickets (non-alcohol), presented by Denyon Homes. Kids run the bases post-game. First pitch at 1:05 PM.

events.title: Intern Capstone Theme Night — Doubleheader vs La Crosse Steam
events.desc: Doubleheader. Celebrate the Ignite interns with an intern-planned theme night — food specials, music, and on-field activities. Bang for Your Buck Night: $2 hot dogs and tap sodas, $4 domestic drafts. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Light Up the Night Fireworks vs Madison Night Mares
events.desc: Post-game fireworks show, presented by Cellcom. First 200 fans receive a light baton. Point Fastpitch Fundraiser Night. First pitch at 6:35 PM.
